Class PlayerModel

java.lang.Object
java.util.Observable
com.risk.model.PlayerModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.atlanmod.risk.core.Player
public class PlayerModel extends Observable implements org.atlanmod.risk.core.Player
"PlayerModel" class represents an object of a player. The properties are: Player name, player's troop number, the color in view screen (displaying) representing the player,
Author:
KaranPannu
